full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Brainstorming assumptions to look for in the paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: ok so for the brunner 2012 paper, the method assumes symmetry right - like f(a,b) = f(b,a). can u giv me an example of when this wld fail in real life
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: I used this only as a starting checklist. Each assumption I wrote was then verified against the paper to confirm it actually applies to this specific method.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Gave me a starting checklist of things to look for: PSD kernels, feature quality, class balance etc.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Each assumption was confirmed by finding the relevant theorem or section in Brunner et al. (2012).

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: for svm to work the kernel matrix shld be PSD right? what happens if its not - does the solver just crash or give wrong answer
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: The explanation I wrote about Assumption 2 is my own. I used the LLM only to deepen my understanding of why PSD matters mathematically.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Reinforced why Lemma 1 in the paper is necessary — without PSD, the SVM QP problem is not convex and may not converge.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked Lemma 1 in the paper and confirmed the connection.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: if training pairs are very imbalanced like way more negative pairs than positive ones, how does that affect svm? does the balanced kernel help or not
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: The plagiarism detection example was suggested by the LLM. The medical scans example for Assumption 3 is my own. I modified and extended both.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Gave me a concrete counterexample of an asymmetric task (plagiarism detection) that I adapted for Assumption 1.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that the scenario genuinely breaks the symmetry requirement by thinking through it independently.

top_5_prompts.why_important: clarified my understanding for assumption 3 violation scenerio

student_declaration.statement: All written descriptions and code in task_1_2.ipynb are my own work. LLM was consulted only for conceptual clarification and brainstorming violation scenarios, not for generating explanations verbatim.
